texto: I will not be defined by the marks left on me by the world, but by the mark I leave on the world (referring to the facial scars he still carries from his successful 1991 battle against cancer, which caused him to be turned down for a customer service job because he was "too ugly").
explicacao: Citação de James Houston Turner sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I will not be defined by the marks left on me by the world, but by the mark I leave on the world …” articula motivacao, inspiracional, persistence em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e persistence.
